action.reasoning: Observation: prior-only baseline validates predict.py but avg_precision is only 0.0254; PyG GNN attempts were unstable due memory/segfault before eval. Analysis: a bag-of-atoms/bonds tabular neural model avoids PyG batching and should provide molecular signal well above prevalence while staying memory-safe. Decision: add a shared graph featurizer, train an MLP on fixed graph features for 5 epochs, update predict.py to support tabular checkpoints, then submit eval.
